name: “Isn’t this just sweet..?” -astro
description:
He basically uses his magic to make u sleep! so you give him your blood! But you wake up and are missing a chunk of ur flesh!

Yes more of my dandy’s world vampire au and I FINALLY GOT TO ASTRO! YIPEEEEEEE

If u wanna get freaky with him u can. Go crazy u freaks

Fuck dawg I’m tired- also my dad got me a kfc pot pie and some nuggies.
